positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a floating hot air balloon array in a vibrant, ethereal sunrise sky. The balloons are silhouetted against the bright gradient of orange, pink, and deep indigo. Include intricate geometric patterns drawn onto the balloon fabrics, suggesting celestial maps or constellations. The composition should be centered, highly symmetrical, and clean, emphasizing strong contrasts between the dark, detailed silhouettes and the smooth, luminous sky background. Style should be vector art mixed with watercolor gradients, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Highly detailed, ultra-sharp, centered.
negative: blurry, artifacts, low quality, poor anatomy, extra limbs, text, logo, watermark, signature, blurry background, noisy, gradient banding, cartoon, photorealistic, messy lines
